title: aerobion filicornu
intro: Aerobion filicornu, also known as the flying fern or flying lichen, is a type of epiphytic lichen that grows on trees and other surfaces. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Aerobion filicornu include soothing coughs, reducing mucus production, and promoting a healthy respiratory system. In herbal preparations, Aerobion filicornu is often dried and made into a tea or used in a tincture form to harness its medicinal properties.
